paragraphs: I am a high school student passionate about data-driven decision making and modern web development.
I enjoy designing polished experiences while building practical tools with Python and web technologies.

now.learning: Advanced Python, statistics, and interface systems
now.building: Portfolio experiments and lightweight full-stack tools
now.reading: Product design and quantitative research articles
now.goal: Ship polished projects that combine utility with thoughtful UX
